title: Simple Math Problem Solver
scenario: Create a short text response to the math problem 'If Sally has 12 apples and gives 4 to her friend, how many apples does Sally have left?'. The response should be in the format 'The answer is <answer>'.
constraints: Must be a single line of text
Must contain the exact phrase 'Sally has'

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated text should adhere to the given constraints (single line, phrase 'Sally has')
The generated text should contain the correct answer to the math problem
The generated text should have a neutral tone
